pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for life coaching services, coaches, programs, blog, and tools. Surfaces featured content and provides global search and navigation into all main flows.
primary_functions: Introduce life coaching services, coaches, and core offerings.
Provide quick navigation to Coaches, Services, Blog, Challenges, Tools, Resources, Custom Plan, and Dashboard.
Highlight featured coaches, popular packages, current challenges, and recent blog articles.
Offer a simple global search or prominent call-to-actions for booking, reading, or starting tools.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click main navigation 'Coaches' or a hero CTA to find a coach
Click main navigation 'Services' or a featured package CTA
Click main navigation 'Blog' or a 'Read the blog' CTA
Click main navigation 'Challenges' or a featured challenge card
Click main navigation 'Tools & Assessments' or a 'Start a self-assessment' CTA
Click main navigation 'Resources' or a featured worksheet link
Click main navigation 'Build Your Plan' or a custom plan hero CTA
Click main navigation 'Reading Lists'
Click main navigation 'Dashboard'
Click footer 'About & Contact'
Click a featured coach card
Click a popular package card
Click a current challenge card
Click a recent blog article title
Click a coach result from global search
Click a package result from global search
Click a challenge result from global search
Click a worksheet result from global search
Click an article result from global search

access_methods.description: Accessible via main navigation link 'Home'
Accessible via footer link 'Home'
Default landing page at site root URL

pages.name: Coaches
pages.description: Browse and filter all available coaches for one-on-one sessions. Supports discovery by specialty, rating, price, and offers like free consultation.
primary_functions: List coaches with key information such as name, specialty, price per session, rating, and review count.
Apply filters by specialty/topic (e.g., stress_management, relationships), price range, session length, rating minimum, review count, and offers (e.g., free_consultation).
Sort coaches by rating, price, or review count (e.g., highest_rated, most_reviews).
Open an individual coach profile by clicking a coach card.

incoming_params.description: Preselected specialty/topic filter, e.g., 'stress_management' or 'relationships'
Optional maximum price per session to pre-filter coaches
Optional session length (in minutes) to pre-filter coaches
Optional offer filter, e.g., 'free_consultation'
Optional initial sort order, e.g., 'rating_desc' or 'review_count_desc'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a coach card in the filtered/sorted list

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Coaches' header navigation link
Accessible via footer link 'Coaches'
Pre-filtered view when arriving with query parameters such as specialty or sortBy
Can be visited directly via its URL

pages.name: Coach Profile
pages.description: Detailed view of a coach with booking and contact options, including availability, ratings, and offers such as free consultations.
primary_functions: Show coach details including bio, specialties, session types, pricing, ratings, and reviews.
Provide a booking widget to select session type (e.g., 60_minute), date, and time slot within available windows.
Allow users to complete a booking form with name, email, and session goals/notes, and submit the booking.
Offer a contact or free consultation request form with name, email, preferred time of day (e.g., morning), and a custom message.
Display confirmation or success messages after booking a session or sending a consultation request.

incoming_params.description: Coach ID whose profile should be displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all coaches' link

access_methods.description: Accessed when a coach card is clicked, passing the coach ID in the URL
Sharable direct link to a given coach profile with an ID parameter

pages.name: Services & Packages
pages.description: Browse and filter structured coaching packages, including topic-focused multi-session offerings such as career change packages.
primary_functions: List coaching packages with information such as topic (e.g., career_change), sessions_count, and package price.
Filter packages by category/topic, number of sessions (e.g., exactly 4 sessions), and price range.
Sort packages by price (e.g., price_low_to_high) or popularity.
Open a specific package detail view by clicking a package card.

incoming_params.description: Optional topic to pre-filter packages, e.g., 'career_change'
Optional exact number of sessions to filter by, e.g., 4
Optional maximum package price to pre-filter, e.g., 400
Optional sort order key, e.g., 'price_asc'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a package card in the listing
Click cart icon in the header while browsing packages

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Services' header navigation link
Accessible via footer link 'Services & Packages'
Accessible in a pre-filtered state using query parameters like topic or sessionsCount
Can be accessed directly at its URL

pages.name: Package Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a coaching package with description, inclusions, and an option to add the package to the shopping cart.
primary_functions: Display full package information including description, included sessions, topic focus, price, and any included resources.
Allow users to add the package to their cart with a single click.
Show related packages or recommended add-ons the user may also consider.

incoming_params.description: Package ID of the coaching package to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after adding a package to cart
Click 'Back to all packages'

access_methods.description: Accessed from the Services listing using a package ID URL parameter
Shareable direct URL to a specific package with an ID parameter

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Review and manage selected packages and services before purchase. Shows current items, quantities, and subtotal.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the cart (e.g., coaching packages) with name, price, and quantity if applicable.
Allow users to remove items from the cart or update quantities where relevant.
Show cart subtotal and total cost and provide a clear next step (e.g., proceed_to_checkout) if implemented.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue browsing packages'

access_methods.description: Accessible by clicking the cart icon in the global header

pages.name: Blog
pages.description: Central hub for articles and content, including search, filtering, and browsing by topic, audience, and freshness.
primary_functions: List blog articles with titles, short descriptions, publish dates, and estimated read times.
Provide a search bar to search articles by keyword (e.g., productivity, time_management).
Offer filters for topic, audience (e.g., working_parents), date range (e.g., last_6_months), and minimum read time (e.g., min_read_time=4).
Open individual article detail pages when users click on article titles.

incoming_params.description: Optional search term to initialize the blog search, e.g., 'productivity' or 'time management'
Optional topic filter value for pre-filtering, e.g., 'productivity'
Optional audience tag, e.g., 'working_parents'
Optional relative date range key, e.g., 'last_6_months'
Optional minimum read time in minutes, e.g., 4
Optional sort key such as 'newest' or 'popular'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title in the blog list or search results

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Blog' header navigation link
Accessible via footer link 'Blog Articles'
Accessible in pre-filtered or pre-searched state using query parameters
Can be visited directly by URL

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Display full article content with options to bookmark and organize articles into named reading lists.
primary_functions: Present the full article content including title, body, publish date, tags, and estimated read time.
Allow users to bookmark or favorite the article for later viewing.
Allow users to save the article to a reading list by creating a new list (e.g., Productivity Sprint) or adding to an existing list.
Show related or recommended articles to encourage further reading.

incoming_params.description: Article ID of the blog post to display
Optional reading list ID indicating the list this article was opened from (for navigation back)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View list' after adding the article to a reading list
Click 'Back to articles'

access_methods.description: Accessed with an article ID in the URL from blog listings or widgets
Shareable direct URL to a specific article with its ID parameter

pages.name: Reading Lists
pages.description: Manage reading lists and access saved articles grouped into named collections.
primary_functions: Display all user-created reading lists with names (e.g., Productivity Sprint) and article counts.
Allow users to open a specific reading list to view its saved articles.
Allow users to remove articles from a list or rename/delete lists if desired.
Provide quick navigation from each article entry back to its article detail page.

incoming_params.description: Optional reading list ID to automatically open when the page loads

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article within an opened reading list

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Reading Lists' header navigation link
Can deep-link into a specific list using the readingListId query parameter
Reading lists overview can be visited directly by URL

pages.name: Challenges
pages.description: Browse and filter structured challenges or programs (e.g., self-discipline challenges) by topic, duration, and start date.
primary_functions: List available challenges with basic details such as title, topic, duration (e.g., 14 days), and start date.
Filter challenges by topic/category (e.g., self_discipline), duration, and start date window (e.g., starting within the next 14 days).
Sort challenges by start date or popularity.
Open a specific challenge detail page when a user selects a challenge.

incoming_params.description: Optional challenge topic to pre-filter, e.g., 'self_discipline'
Optional exact duration in days to filter, e.g., 14
Optional relative start-date filter key, e.g., 'next_14_days'
Optional sort key like 'start_date_asc' or 'popularity_desc'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a challenge card in the listing

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Challenges' header navigation link
Accessible via footer link 'Challenges & Programs'
Can be opened with pre-applied filters via query parameters
Challenges overview URL can be accessed directly

pages.name: Challenge Detail
pages.description: Show details of a specific challenge and allow enrollment with configurable reminder settings.
primary_functions: Display full challenge information, including goals, daily activities, duration, schedule, and start date.
Provide an enrollment form with fields for name and email.
Allow users to configure reminder settings (e.g., daily email reminders, 8_00_am reminder time, no_sms).
Confirm successful enrollment and explain what the user can expect next.

incoming_params.description: Challenge ID for the challenge whose details should be shown

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to challenges' after viewing or enrolling

access_methods.description: Opened when a user selects a challenge, passing its ID in the URL
Direct link to a particular challenge using its ID

pages.name: Assessments & Tools
pages.description: Browse and filter self-assessment tools such as life balance assessments, organized by category and length.
primary_functions: List available assessments with titles, categories (e.g., life_balance), and approximate number of questions.
Filter assessments by category and question range (e.g., between 10 and 30 questions).
Open an assessment detail page to start a chosen assessment.

incoming_params.description: Optional category filter, e.g., 'life_balance'
Optional minimum number of questions for filtering assessments
Optional maximum number of questions for filtering assessments
Optional sort key such as 'shortest_first' or 'popular'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an assessment card to open and potentially start it

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Tools & Assessments' header navigation link
Accessible via footer link 'Tools & Assessments'
Pre-filtered access possible via query parameters for category and question count
Assessments listing can be opened directly by URL

pages.name: Assessment Detail
pages.description: Run through an individual assessment, show results, and save them to the Dashboard. Also used to re-open and review saved assessment results.
primary_functions: Present an assessment introduction and allow users to start the assessment.
Display each question and collect user responses (e.g., mid_to_high values on 1–10 scales or multiple-choice options).
Calculate and show results on completion, including summaries and suggested next steps.
Allow users to save the completed assessment results to their Dashboard for later viewing.

incoming_params.description: Assessment definition ID when starting a new assessment
Completed assessment instance ID when re-opening saved results from Dashboard

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Go to Dashboard' after saving results
Click 'Back to assessments'

access_methods.description: Opened either with an assessmentId (new run) or instanceId (view results)
Specific assessments or saved results can be linked to directly via their IDs

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Personal overview hub for saved assessments, plans, and resources, providing quick access to detailed views and a snapshot of progress.
primary_functions: Show a summary of saved items, including completed assessments, saved worksheets, and custom coaching plans.
Provide quick access to open a saved assessment’s summary (using assessment_detail.html for details when needed).
List saved custom plans (e.g., March Focus) and allow users to open each plan’s detail view (e.g., via custom_plan.html).
Display saved worksheets/resources and provide links to open worksheet_detail.html for each.
Offer internal navigation (tabs or sections) to jump directly to assessments, plans, or resources subsections.

incoming_params.description: Optional section/tab to focus when loading the dashboard, e.g., 'assessments', 'plans', or 'worksheets'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved assessment entry card
Click a saved custom plan such as 'March Focus'
Click a saved worksheet/resource card

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Dashboard' header navigation link
Specific Dashboard tab can be chosen using the 'section' query parameter
Dashboard root can be opened directly by URL

pages.name: Resources & Worksheets
pages.description: Browse and filter downloadable worksheets and resources by topic, audience, and length (page count).
primary_functions: List worksheets and downloadable resources with titles, topics, audiences, and page counts.
Filter resources by topic (e.g., time_management), audience (e.g., working_parents), and length/page count (e.g., max_pages=10).
Open a worksheet detail page when a user selects a resource.

incoming_params.description: Optional worksheet topic to pre-filter, e.g., 'time_management'
Optional audience filter, e.g., 'working_parents'
Optional maximum page count for filtering worksheets, e.g., 10

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a worksheet/resource card in the listing

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Resources' header navigation link
Accessible via footer link 'Resources & Worksheets'
Can be opened with pre-applied filters using topic/audience/maxPages query parameters
Resources overview URL can be visited directly

pages.name: Worksheet Detail
pages.description: Show details and download options for a specific worksheet, and allow saving it into the user's personal toolkit and Dashboard.
primary_functions: Display worksheet information such as description, target audience, page count, and format.
Provide a link or button to download or view the worksheet content.
Allow users to save the worksheet to their personal toolkit or Dashboard for later access.

incoming_params.description: Worksheet ID whose details and download options should be shown

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View in Dashboard' after saving the worksheet
Click 'Back to resources'

access_methods.description: Accessed from the Resources listing or Dashboard by passing a worksheet ID
Direct URL to the worksheet detail with ID parameter

pages.name: Custom Plan Builder
pages.description: Build and review a custom coaching plan composed of individual sessions and group workshops, and view saved plan details.
primary_functions: List available individual coaching sessions with prices and allow filtering by maximum price per session (e.g., max_price_per_session=120).
List available group workshops with prices and allow filtering by maximum workshop cost (e.g., max_workshop_price=80).
Allow users to add or remove individual sessions and workshops to/from a plan and show a running total cost.
Help users ensure the plan meets constraints (e.g., exactly 2 individual sessions, 1 workshop, and total_cost <= 300).
Enable saving the plan with a custom name (e.g., March Focus) and provide a detailed view of saved plans when opened via Dashboard or internal navigation.

incoming_params.description: Custom plan ID to load an existing saved plan into detail view mode

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Go to My Plans' after saving a custom plan

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Build Your Plan' header navigation link
Plan detail mode is accessed when a planId parameter is provided
Custom plan builder root can be loaded directly by URL

pages.name: About & Contact
pages.description: Provide background information on the coaching practice, overall mission, and a general contact form plus combined privacy and terms information.
primary_functions: Explain the mission, values, and background of the life coaching services.
Provide a general contact form for inquiries with fields such as name, email, and message.
Offer secondary information such as combined privacy and terms details in a dedicated section.

incoming_params.description: Page section to scroll/focus to, e.g., 'about', 'contact', or 'policies'. Used by the 'Privacy & Terms' footer link via 'policies'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click logo or 'Back to Home' link from About & Contact

access_methods.description: Accessible via footer link 'About & Contact' and 'Privacy & Terms'
Specific sections are addressable via the 'section' query parameter (e.g., section=policies)
About & Contact page can be loaded directly by URL

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and entry points to all main sections.
Browse and filter all available coaches.
View and filter coaching services and multi-session packages.
Read articles and insights on coaching, productivity, and life balance.
Explore and join structured challenges and programs.
Access self-assessment tools such as life balance assessments.
Create and save a custom coaching plan.
Manage reading lists and saved articles.
View saved assessments, plans, and resources in one place.

footer_links.description: Learn about the coaching practice and send general inquiries.
View combined privacy and terms information.
